condition_expression: family_label can be uniquely mapped from approved subtype_label
notes: Must map to one of the frozen family labels

condition_expression: file is decodable and not corrupted
notes: Failed decode triggers D03

condition_expression: duration_sec >= 3.0
notes: Shorter files excluded by D04

condition_expression: subtype_label is in the frozen whitelist
notes: Whitelist frozen in freeze_config.yaml

condition_expression: no exact duplicate found or current file selected as canonical copy
notes: Exact duplicates resolved before freeze

condition_expression: soundfile.info().subtype is in recognized set (PCM_16/PCM_24/PCM_32/FLOAT)
notes: Auto-pass: recognized subtype; auto-escalate: unrecognized → manual review (review_type=i10_encoding); approved with bit_depth_override

condition_expression: file corrupted unreadable or abnormal duration metadata
notes: Direct automatic exclusion

condition_expression: duration_sec < 3.0
notes: Too short for stable identification

condition_expression: silence_ratio > D05a_threshold (default 0.70; per-family override via freeze_config.yaml)
notes: Direct automatic exclusion; threshold from freeze_config.yaml thresholds.d05a_default or threshold_overrides

condition_expression: clipping_ratio > D06a_threshold (default 0.02; per-family override via freeze_config.yaml)
notes: Direct automatic exclusion; threshold from freeze_config.yaml

condition_expression: subtype_label not in frozen whitelist
notes: Out-of-scope instrument subtype

condition_expression: classification requires subjective guessing rather than stable evidence
notes: Conservative exclusion

condition_expression: audio_sha256 matches an already kept file and current file is not canonical
notes: Canonical = first by (source_dataset ASC, source_subtype_dir ASC, file_name ASC); same family + same dataset → automatic; cross-family or cross-dataset → manual review (review_type=d09_cross)

condition_expression: redundant near-duplicate: if unique_recordings_count >= 35 keep only canonical per group; if < 35 keep all takes
notes: Threshold: 35 = R01(25) * 1.4; ChMusic does not execute D10

condition_expression: build recording_group_id from source_subtype_dir plus normalized_base_name
notes: High-precision automatic grouping; Step 2a detects whitespace variants

condition_expression: merge after fingerprint evidence and manual confirmation
notes: fpcalc bitwise hamming similarity >= 0.85 or sliding-window containment >= 0.90 → manual review (review_type=g02_fingerprint); approved → merge groups; rejected → no merge (no keep/drop change)

condition_expression: phrase_recording_ratio_per_class <= 0.15
notes: Downsampled rows: drop_reason=phrase_quota_downsampled; sort by (source_subtype_dir, normalized_base_name, file_name) before sampling

condition_expression: controlled_plus_technique_ratio_per_class >= 0.80
notes: Pure monitoring metric — no adjustment action

condition_expression: min_max_recording_ratio >= 0.20 hard floor ideally >= 0.33
notes: Pure monitoring metric — no adjustment action

condition_expression: segment_count_cv_across_classes <= 0.30
notes: CV = std/mean of per-class segment counts; monitoring only

condition_expression: kept_recordings_per_class < 25
notes: Halt production run; modify freeze_config.yaml and re-run

condition_expression: kept_recordings_per_class < 0.40 * median_kept_recordings_across_final_classes
notes: Halt production run; modify freeze_config.yaml and re-run

condition_expression: unique_recording_groups_per_class < 7 or impossible to allocate at least one val and one test group
notes: Halt production run; modify freeze_config.yaml and re-run

condition_expression: family_label belongs to a class replaced out
notes: Applied when class replacement is confirmed in freeze_config.yaml

condition_expression: kept_recordings_per_family_in_chmusic >= 4
notes: Hard gate: if < 4 kept recordings, require decision in freeze_config.yaml chmusic_r05_decisions (accept_limited or threshold_override)

condition_expression: same recording_group_id must stay in one split
notes: Primary leakage prevention

condition_expression: all segments from one original recording stay in one split
notes: Split before segmentation
